description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian with an athletic build, dressed in urban adventure attire. She wears a sleeveless fitted top and rugged cargo pants with reinforced knee pads, suitable for active movement in city environments. Her arms are adorned with fingerless gloves and wristbands, and she has a visible armband on her upper arm. The footwear consists of sturdy, high-ankle boots with straps and buckles, designed for durability and support. Her hair is styled in a long, thick braid that drapes over her shoulder. The overall appearance suggests a practical, streetwise individual prepared for dynamic urban scenarios.
description: Athletic female adult in urban adventure clothing, with cargo pants, boots, gloves, and a long braid.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the braid, sleeveless top, gloves, and arm accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm bands, and the contour of the cargo pants and boots.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the boots, knee pads, and the underside of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the facial profile, wristbands, and the full length of the braid.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top, cargo pants with knee pads, fingerless gloves, wristbands, high-ankle boots
attribute_posture: lying flat on the back with arms and legs extended
